scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agentspaces/shared build && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/renderer build && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/electron build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @agentspaces/shared lint && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/renderer lint && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/electron lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @agentspaces/shared test && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/renderer test && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/electron test
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter @agentspaces/electron exec electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:win: pnpm --filter @agentspaces/electron exec electron-builder --publish never --win nsis portable
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @agentspaces/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/renderer typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentspaces/electron typecheck
